name: Vitest test-DB harness
outcome: A Vitest + dedicated test-database harness (config, .env.test, globalSetup migrate+seed, between-test truncation) exists so every test-first slice can run against oauth_test.
scope: vitest.config.ts, tests/.env.test, tests/setup globalSetup + truncation, and a smoke test proving the harness. The actual flow/repo/negative specs live in their own slices.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm test (vitest) boots against oauth_test via tests/.env.test
globalSetup creates oauth_test if absent, runs the drizzle migration, and seeds it once
Between-test truncation clears oauthTokens, oauthAuthCodes, oauthTokenScopes, oauthAuthCodeScopes while keeping seeded users/clients/scopes/oauthClientScopes
steps: vitest.config.ts — load tests/.env.test and set globalSetup; package.json test script -> vitest
tests/.env.test — define DATABASE_URL (a dedicated oauth_test database) and JWT_SECRET
tests/setup/global-setup.ts — create oauth_test if absent (createdb / CREATE DATABASE; docker-compose is out of scope), then run the drizzle migration + seed once
tests/setup — truncate oauthTokens, oauthAuthCodes, oauthTokenScopes, oauthAuthCodeScopes between tests; keep seeded users/clients/scopes/oauthClientScopes

tests/harness.test.ts — a smoke test (query a seeded scope, or GET /api/ping via app.request) confirming the harness migrates+seeds and truncation resets dynamic state between tests — verify it passes
notes: Extracted from the integration-flow slice during PRD review so the test-first slices (read-repos 5, persist-repos 6, token/revoke 8, authorize 9) have a harness to run against. Numbered 14 for append-only id stability, but it executes EARLY: blocked_by 3 (seed) and blocking 5 (read-repos), so the whole 5 -> 11 chain consumes it through the dependency graph (the one backward-numbered dep, 5 -> 14, is intentional). Reused unchanged by the integration-flow (11) and resilience (13) slices.
